prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after ophthalmology referral for suspected retinopathy
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 103.5 kg; Height 174.7 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 145/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 190mg/dL; 9 months ago 201mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 103.1kg; 9 months ago 103.8kg; 6 months ago 103.2kg; 3 months ago 100.2kg; current 103.5kg), Height (12 months ago 174.7cm; 9 months ago 174.7cm; 6 months ago 174.7cm; 3 months ago 174.7cm; current 174.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 147mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 148mmHg; current 145mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 49U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 52U/L), AST (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 42U/L; current 42U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 18mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 777mg/g; 9 months ago 657mg/g; 6 months ago 670mg/g; 3 months ago 983mg/g; current 849mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 76mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 124mg/dL; 6 months ago 140mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
